.gitignore.general_idea: Ignore the flattened POM file generated by the maven-shade-plugin or similar tools to prevent committing build artifacts.

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Install and configure JDK 21 in the build environment to replace the previous JDK version.
buildspec.yml.why_exists: The build will fail to compile or run if the target JDK (21) is not present in the CodeBuild image, as the project has been migrated to require Java 21 features or APIs.

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Update Maven command to use the new SonarQube property name 'sonar.token' instead of the deprecated 'sonar.login'.
buildspec.yml.why_exists: Newer versions of the SonarQube Maven plugin may reject or warn about the deprecated 'sonar.login' property, potentially causing build failures or analysis errors.

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Change Maven build goal from 'install' to 'deploy' in the build phase.
Refactor versioning logic to dynamically extract revision and construct project version from POM and git metadata.
Add OWASP dependency check skip configuration to the Maven build command.
Add git tagging and pushing logic to the build pipeline to tag releases automatically.
buildspec.yml.after:
git config user.name "$CLOUDTRAIN_CODEBUILD_GIT_TAG_USER"
git config user.email "$CLOUDTRAIN_CODEBUILD_GIT_TAG_EMAIL"
git tag -a $PROJECT_VERSION -m "$CODEBUILD_BUILD_ARN"
git remote set-url origin "https://$GITHUB_TOKEN@github.com/msgoat/$CNJ_ARTIFACT_ID.git"
git push origin HEAD:$VERSION_CHANGELIST $PROJECT_VERSION

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Add new environment variables for git tagging, OWASP scanning, and GitHub authentication.
Add NIST NVD API key environment variable for vulnerability scanning.
Add artifact ID environment variable for use in git remote URL construction.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; without this change, the build would target JDK 17 bytecode, failing JDK 21-specific feature usage or compliance checks.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Quarkus framework version from 2.16.3.Final to 3.8.1 to support JDK 21 and modern APIs.
pom.xml.why_exists: Quarkus 2.x does not support JDK 21; upgrading is required to compile and run on the target JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace legacy RESTEasy dependencies with Quarkus 3 reactive RESTEasy and Jackson extensions.
pom.xml.why_exists: Quarkus 3 removed or deprecated the classic RESTEasy JSON-B extensions in favor of reactive variants; using old artifacts causes compile errors or missing classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the javax-specific test dependency as it is incompatible with Jakarta EE / Quarkus 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Quarkus 3 uses Jakarta EE namespaces; the javax-based test artifact is obsolete and likely causes classpath conflicts or missing class errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade SLF4J logging library to version 2.0.11 to match Quarkus 3 and JDK 21 ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: SLF4J 1.7.x may have compatibility issues with newer logging bridges or Quarkus 3 internals; upgrading ensures runtime stability.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JUnit Jupiter testing framework to version 5.10.1.
Upgrade RestAssured testing library to version 5.4.0.
Add AssertJ assertion library as a new test dependency.
Add Quarkus JUnit5 Mockito extension for mocking in tests.
Upgrade Maven compiler plugin to version 3.11.0 to support JDK 21 compilation features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may not fully support JDK 21 language features or bytecode generation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Maven Surefire plugin to version 3.2.1 for test execution.
Upgrade Maven Failsafe plugin to version 3.2.1 for integration test execution.
Upgrade Docker Maven plugin to version 0.43.4.
Upgrade Compose Maven plugin to version 5.1.0.
Upgrade Helm Maven plugin to version 5.0.0.
Add OWASP Dependency Check plugin for security vulnerability scanning.
Add JaCoCo Maven plugin configuration for code coverage reporting.
Update Kubernetes cluster namespace and ingress host properties for deployment environment.
Add multi-platform support for Docker builds (AMD64 and ARM64).
Update project description to reflect the demonstration nature of the application.
pom.xml.before: <description>Cloud native Java backend based on Quarkus using MP Config</description>
pom.xml.after: <description>Cloud native Java backend based demonstrating application configuration with MP Config based on Quarkus</description>

pom.xml.general_idea: Update project revision version to 8.0.0.
Remove the 'local-stage' Maven profile entirely.
Simplify 'pre-commit-stage' profile by removing inline plugin configurations for Docker, Compose, and QA tools, replacing them with skip properties.
pom.xml.before:
<profile>
    <id>pre-commit-stage</id>
    <build>
        <plugins>
            <!-- surefire, resources, docker, compose, failsafe, dependency, jacoco plugins -->
        </plugins>
    </build>
</profile>

pom.xml.general_idea: Refactor 'commit-stage' profile to use centralized Docker image configuration with Buildx support instead of inline executions.
Remove inline plugin configurations for resources, compose, failsafe, dependency, jacoco, and sonar from 'commit-stage' profile.
pom.xml.before:
<build>
    <plugins>
        <!-- maven-resources-plugin, compose-maven-plugin, maven-failsafe-plugin, maven-dependency-plugin, jacoco-maven-plugin, sonar-maven-plugin -->
    </plugins>
</build>

pom.xml.general_idea: Update 'integration-test-stage' profile properties to skip Sonar, Compose, Docker, Dependency Check, and Jacoco.
Simplify Helm deployment in 'integration-test-stage' by removing resource copying and uninstall steps, keeping only pull and deploy.
Move Failsafe system property configuration from execution block to plugin configuration in 'integration-test-stage'.
Add explicit plugin repository for CloudTrain Maven repository.
Add explicit dependency repository for CloudTrain Maven repository.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the base Docker image from Java 17 to Java 21 to align with the JDK migration.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.why_exists: The application is being migrated to JDK 21; running on a JRE 17 image would cause runtime incompatibility or failure to start if JDK 21-specific features are used.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch JVM garbage collector to ZGC with generational support and add UTF-8 encoding flag for JDK 21 optimization.

src/main/helm/cnj-config-backend-quarkus.general_idea: Replace hardcoded Helm chart version with a variable placeholder to allow dynamic versioning during the build process.

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Migrate Java EE imports to Jakarta EE namespace to comply with JDK 21 and modern Jakarta EE standards.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.why_exists: javax.* packages are removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and incompatible with modern CDI/JAX-RS implementations on JDK 21, causing compile errors.

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Migrate JAX-RS and CDI annotations from javax namespace to jakarta namespace.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.why_exists: javax.ws.rs and javax.enterprise packages are removed in Jakarta EE 10+ (targeted by Java 21 ecosystems); code fails to compile with 'package does not exist' errors.

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Migrate CDI and transaction annotations from javax to jakarta namespace.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.enterprise.context does not exist in Jakarta EE 10+ / Quarkus 3+ environments.

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Change CDI bean scope from Dependent to ApplicationScoped.
Remove private access modifier from injected fields.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.before:
private String configStringValue;
private int configNumericValue;

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Refactor message construction to use setters and update text content.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.before: return new Message(UUID.randomUUID(), "hello", String.format("Welcome to Cloud Native Java with %s! configNumericValue : %d", this.configStringValue, this.configNumericValue));

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Add import for java.util.Locale used in the refactored method.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.why_exists: Compile error: cannot find symbol class Locale.

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Removed unused import of java.util.Objects as it is no longer used in the class.
Added import for java.util.Locale to support the new locale field.
Removed Javadoc comment block from the class definition.
Added a new private field 'locale' of type Locale to the entity.
Simplified the constructor to only accept UUID, removing code and text parameters.
Added getter and setter methods for the new locale field.
Refactored hashCode to only use the id field, removing dependency on Objects.hash.
Refactored equals method to only compare the id field, removing comparison of code and text.

src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Refactor test to use AssertJ assertions instead of RestAssured's built-in Hamcrest matchers for better readability and consistency.
Extract the REST response into a typed Message object to enable detailed field-level assertions.
src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.before: .body("text", response -> startsWith("Welcome to Cloud Native Java with "));

src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Add explicit null checks for the response object and its fields to ensure robustness.
Update the text content assertion to match the specific framework name (Quarkus) and use AssertJ syntax.
src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.before: .body("text", response -> startsWith("Welcome to Cloud Native Java with "));
src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.after: assertThat(welcomeMessage.getText()).as("message.text must start with expected text").startsWith("Welcome to Cloud Native Java with Quarkus");

src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Remove public modifier from test method to follow JUnit 5 best practices (package-private default).
